allow: Bash(timeout 30 bash -c 'until curl -sf http://localhost:5173 >/dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 1; done')

Bash(node -e "const s=require\('./public/data/snapshot.json'\); console.log\(Object.keys\(s\)\); console.log\('rateHist:', s.rateHist ? Object.keys\(s.rateHist\) : 'MISSING'\); if\(s.rateHist\){for\(const k of Object.keys\(s.rateHist\)\){console.log\('  '+k+': len='+\(Array.isArray\(s.rateHist[k]\)?s.rateHist[k].length:typeof s.rateHist[k]\)\)}} console.log\('chaosPrice:', s.chaosPrice\); console.log\('divinePrice:', s.divinePrice\); console.log\('source:', s.source\); console.log\('updated:', s.updated\);")

Bash(node -e "const s=require\('/tmp/live.json'\); console.log\('top-level keys:', Object.keys\(s\)\); console.log\('source:', s.source\); console.log\('chaosPrice:', s.chaosPrice, '\(isFull =', s.chaosPrice!=null, '\)'\); console.log\('rateHist:', s.rateHist===undefined?'KEY ABSENT':\(s.rateHist===null?'null':JSON.stringify\(Object.fromEntries\(Object.entries\(s.rateHist\).map\(\([k,v]\)=>[k,Array.isArray\(v\)?'len '+v.length:v]\)\)\)\)\); console.log\('items:', Array.isArray\(s.items\)?s.items.length:'n/a'\);")

Bash(node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\).on\('end',\(\)=>{const s=JSON.parse\(d\);const keys=Object.keys\(s\);console.log\('has rateHist?', keys.includes\('rateHist'\)?\('YES len div='+\(s.rateHist?.div?.length\)\):'NO'\);console.log\('has rateSpark?', keys.includes\('rateSpark'\)?\('YES len div='+\(s.rateSpark?.div?.length\)\):'NO'\);}\)")
